# Justin Chill

> A personal blog featuring research, data visualizations, and interactive insights on politics, technology, and history.

I publish research posts, historical visualizations, and interactive data analyses.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://justinchill.com/): Current featured posts, latest updates, and links to topics.
- [Blog Archive](https://justinchill.com/blog.html): A full archive of all 80+ posts, categorized by topic (Politics, Tech, History, Sports, Nature, etc.).
- [Now](https://justinchill.com/now.html): A log of what Justin is currently working on and thinking about.

## Featured Visualizations

- [AI Eats the World (2025)](https://justinchill.com/AI-2025.html): Analysis and interactive graphics of Benedict Evans' platform shift thesis for Generative AI.
- [Wheat & Wages](https://justinchill.com/wheat-and-wages.html): Recreating William Playfair's 1822 classic combination chart of wheat prices vs.Weekly wages.
- [Aircraft safety](https://justinchill.com/plane-crash.html): Air travel is getting safer.
- [Black Sea Fleet](https://justinchill.com/black-sea-fleet.html): A chronological visualization of Russian naval losses in the Black Sea.
- [Space Waste](https://justinchill.com/space-waste.html): Interactive tracking of orbital debris and space trash over time.
- [The 'Failing' NYT](https://justinchill.com/failingNYT.html): Data visualization analyzing the business metrics and digital subscription growth of the New York Times.
- [Operation Grim Beeper](https://justinchill.com/grim-beeper.html): Map and timeline analysis of the pager explosions in Lebanon.
